title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Date: 2026-06-05 (file refs updated 2026-06-06 package conversion). Method: two independent reviewers analysed full codebase (app.R, global.R, R/*.R, test-smoke.R, PLAN.md, CLAUDE.md), debated consensus: Note: review predates R-package conversion. says app.R read R/run_app.R; global.R now split R/zzz.R (.onLoad SerialParam fix), R/constants.R, R/daemons.R; test-smoke.R / tests/run-tests.R now tests/testthat/. See Decision log bottom everything done review (package, cache, export, pkgdown, Docker, CI, persistent settings, xcmsVis). Agent P — pragmatic maintainer, bias toward low-risk incremental change. Agent S — structural/design-first, willing argue deeper refactors. Every claim checked code least one reviewer (initial overstatements corrected debate — noted inline). document agreed plan, wish list.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Tier 1 Tier 2 implemented, tested, committed main (parse-checked, 72/72 unit + filter-equivalence assertions green, app boots HTTP 200, key paths verified interactively). item marked ✅ commit subject. open question resolved: mtime cache key (raw files overwritten practice). Remaining ideas live future_work.md.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: architecture sound scope (single-user, local, raw visualisation ). load-bearing, easy--get-wrong parts — SerialParam + mzR--workers performance split, seconds-internally time discipline, ColorBrewer/viridis-colour, cache keying — already centralised respected. remaining debt ordinary duplication plus real test gap, two spots duplication latent correctness hazard rather style nit. reviewers explicitly declined structural rewrite. full “data-service accessor layer” S originally proposed withdrawn verifying rv “god-object” pain thinner looked: rv$filter constructed exactly one place (mod_filter.R:60-82) real leak plot modules two lines reading rv$filter$ms_level.

what: What is already good — do not touch
title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Centralised performance contract. register(SerialParam()) R/zzz.R (.onLoad); mirai workers requireNamespace("mzR"); heavy Spectra/xcms work main process. whole performance story — -limits. Clean reactive graph composition root: included() → data_key() → raw_msexp() (cached) → dataset() → modules (R/run_app.R). Cache discipline: data_key() keyed path-set + filter; bindCache heavy reactives excludes cosmetic inputs. Edge discipline: seconds internally, conversion display/input edges; colours fct_palettes.R. Good existing primitives: mod_export (reusable, takes plot_gg reactive), zoom_keeper() (encapsulates hard-won plotly zoom-persistence trick — uirevision already tried hold zoom ). fct_*.R layer Shiny-free (input/output/rv references) — .e. testable core already isolated. just isn’t tested.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: item: effort (S/M/L) · risk (low/med/high) · definition done.

what: Tier 1 — do now (low-risk, additive, high value) — ✅ ALL DONE
title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: ✅ finalize_plotly(p, source, keep_zoom) helper — S · low. DoD: identical ggplotly → keep_zoom → 3× event_register chain (issue 1) one call 5 modules; app boots HTTP 200; zoom + click still work faahKO + msdata. wire_selection(source, plot_name) helper near-identical click→rv$selection handler can ride along. Done: added register_plotly_events / finalize_plotly / wire_selection; click→spectrum verified interactively. ✅ Filter-equivalence invariant test — M · low. single highest-value item. DoD: battery filter configs (ms_level, rt, mz, intensity, polarity, spectrum_id), spectra surviving apply_filters equal surviving apply_filters_spectra real msdata file. Folds old benchmarks/filter-test.R. Makes lock-step (issue 2) safe. Done: tests/testthat/test-filters.R. Update (2026-06-06): original dependency-free tests/run-tests.R runner since folded tests/testthat/ part package conversion — testthat (edition 3) now suite, run via testthat::test_local(".") / R CMD check. ✅ Single filter schema + make_filter() constructor — S/M · low-med. DoD: make_rv() mod_filter build filter one definition (issue 3). Done: empty_filter() + make_filter() fct_filters.R. ✅ Kill rv$filter$ms_level leak — S · low. DoD: single chrom_ms_level(filter) helper holds … else 1L default (issue 4); tic/eic longer read rv$filter$ms_level directly. Done. ✅ Tests pure helpers — S · low. DoD: covers rt round-trips, bin_peaks, combined_ranges, polarity_label, isTRUE_vec, scan-matching, palettes, filter helpers; test-smoke.R upgraded assert. Done: tests/test-helpers.R (+ smoke stopifnot). 72 assertions. ✅ Per-file error isolation multi-file extraction loops — S · low. DoD: one unreadable file skipped + reported instead aborting plot (issue 8). Done via purrr::possibly inside extract_over_files (item 8) — per request, possibly rather tryCatch. Verified bogus path. ✅ Repo hygiene — S · trivial. DoD: logs / *./ stray scripts git-ignored removed (issue 11). Done: already covered .gitignore; benchmarks/filter-test.R folded test suite removed.

what: Tier 2 — do opportunistically — ✅ ALL DONE (done now alongside Tier 1)
title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: ✅ extract_over_files(files_df, extractor, …) unification — M · low-med. DoD: triplicated per-file loop + round(rt,3) scan-join (issue 5) live one helper; map/precursors/spectrum call ; output identical real data. Done — also carries item-6 possibly isolation. ✅ Small shared helpers: new_eic_target() 3× append literal (issue 6); scan_for_rt() documenting 3-decimal rt contract — S · low. Done (scan_for_rt landed item 8; new_eic_target utils_reactive.R). ✅ Disable MS-map export button 3D modes — S · low. DoD: export hidden mode != "map" (narrow fix issue 10). Done via conditionalPanel. Full renderer unification stays declined. ✅ clear_caches() file-set change — S · low. DoD: .scan_cache/.spectra_cache emptied memory doesn’t grow (issue 9). Done: clear_ms_caches() called ingest “Clear ” handler (precise W5 gap), rather every include-toggle (thrash still-relevant per-path cache). ✅ Narrow settings observer — S · low. DoD: cosmetic change doesn’t fan beyond consumers. Done: rv$settings now nested reactiveValues (per-field reactivity) written per-field observeEvents — verified: switching time unit relabels axes without touching palette/export consumers.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Full data-service accessor layer — payoff mostly aesthetic single-user local app; cost app-wide signature + test churn medium risk, unit-test layer (plot modules) least worth unit-testing. Replaced Tier-1 leak fix (item 4). reviewers. Generic plot-module factory / R6 / S7 class hierarchy / plugin registry — -engineering 5 fixed tabs; view real divergence (EIC target table, spectrum’s 3 layouts + scan-list modal, map’s 3 plotly-native modes). Extract shared tail, whole module. Plotly-map → ggplot renderer unification — two renderers intentional (interactive scattergl/surface can’t ggsaved; 3D can’t export static ggplot). Use item 10 instead. (path, mtime) cache key — see open question ; clear-(item 11) agreed default. Touching SerialParam + mzR--workers split, zoom_keeper/uirevision, seconds-internally rule, ColorBrewer constraint — locked, documented dogmas. -limits. Async-ifying heavy reads, state-management framework, DT-checkbox abstraction, swappable-backend layer — scope / speculative. Peak picking / grouping / alignment — deferred design (see Deferred: preprocessing ).

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: caches additionally key file mtime? Agent P argued yes — overwriting file path (re-running acquisition lab box) serves stale spectra silently. Agent S argued — single-user local app user typed path isn’t rewriting files mid-session, non-event, clear--file-set-change (item 11) already bounds risk. Recommendation: ship clear-(item 11) now; add (path, mtime) keying user actually reports re-acquisition/overwrite workflow. Low stakes either way. ✅ RESOLVED (2026-06-05): user confirmed files rarely overwritten — mtime key. Clear-(item 11) shipped; mtime declined.

Remaining ideas (xcms objects, peak picking, CAMERA-style cross-sample grouping) live future_work.md Deferred: preprocessing section .

text: Converted sourced app installable R package. app.R + side-effecting tail global.R → exported run_app() R/run_app.R; global.R split R/zzz.R (.onLoad → register(SerialParam())), R/constants.R, R/daemons.R. Imports declared per-function via roxygen; NAMESPACE/man/ generated. MS S4 stack (Spectra/MsExperiment/xcms/ BiocParallel/mzR) called via :: dodge overlapping-generic conflicts. Test suite → testthat (edition 3) tests/testthat/; R CMD check passes Status: OK. Real-data tests skip msdata/faahKO absent. CI — GitHub Actions R-CMD-check.yaml (full suite incl. real data) + pkgdown.yaml; renv autoloader disabled CI. pkgdown site screenshot-driven usage guide (vignettes/articles/usage.Rmd, chromote-captured figures via data-raw/capture-screenshots.R). Replaced hand-written USER_GUIDE.md. Docker wrapper (Bioconductor base) server deployment.

previous_headings: Decision log (work done after the review above)
title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Settings persist across restarts — allow-listed fields written JSON per-user config dir (tools::R_user_dir("xcmsVisGUI","config"), R/fct_settings_store.R). Chosen -package file normal install writable. Added default EIC tolerance setting (value + ppm/Da). Persistent extraction cache (R/fct_cache.R) — heavy bindCache results (TIC/BPC + EIC tibbles) go layered memory + disk cache: memory fast -session primary, disk persistent backing re-opening app files + filter instant. disk layer custom cachem-compatible store serialising qs2 compress_level = 0 (benchmarked: gzip RDS 1.5–4 s vs qs2 L0 0.1–0.4 s app’s 0.5–1.5M-row result sizes, similar file size). LRU eviction past ~2 GB / 30 days. raw MsExperiment stays session (memory) cache — worth disk-serialising S4 object file-backed backend. clear_ms_caches() (“Clear ”) also resets disk cache. mtime keying (files aren’t overwritten practice — confirmed user).

previous_headings: Decision log (work done after the review above)
title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Single-spectrum annotation overlaid Spectrum view (R/fct_annotate.R + mod_plot_spectrum). commonMZ (GitHub-, hence Remotes: field) adduct/fragment dictionary; InterpretMSSpectrum::findMAIN auto ranker — hard Imports. Three modes share one dictionary manual auto annotate identically: - Manual anchor — user designates peak known ion; invert neutral mass (m/z = (nmol·M + massdiff)/|charge|, massdiff commonMZ::MZ_CAMERA) project adducts + M+1 isotopes + -source neutral losses (commonMZ::adducts_fragments), matching within shared ppm/Da tol. - Auto-suggest — findMAIN (constrained commonMZ’s quasi-molecular adducts) ranks (M, main-adduct) hypotheses; chosen row fills anchor. - Difference network — peak pairs whose Δm/z matches dictionary entry. CAMERA / cliqueMS / RAMClustR: need multi-sample feature matrix (coelution/correlation across detected peaks) — incompatible app’s raw-, one-spectrum---time model, prone false hits noisy raw scans. anchor-first design puts molecular-ion decision user. engine pure (Shiny) unit-tested synthetic + real (msdata) spectra. Click disambiguation: Click → EIC list | → set anchor toggle reuses existing spectrum-click plumbing. Annotation tolerance reuses persisted default-tolerance setting (new persisted fields). Re-encodes commonMZ’s Latin-1 origin text UTF-8.

previous_headings: Decision log (work done after the review above)
title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: Re-examined whether delegate plotting xcmsVis (gplot* → ggplot, amendable post-hoc + aes()/geom_/scale_). Declined current raw-scope. Reasons: 1. Loadability — R install, accessing exported symbol segfaults (reproducible, exit 139; likely lazy-load/Rcpp-ABI issue Rcpp 1.1.0→1.1.1). library(xcmsVis) loads first symbol touch crashes — isn’t even callable right now. 2. Input type — methods dispatch XChromatograms / XcmsExperiment / MChromatograms (xcms/MSnbase result objects). deliberately extract plain tibbles (cached, computed SerialParam); feeding xcmsVis means keeping xcms objects live, fights qs2 tibble cache. 3. Post-hoc + additive — can’t rewire mappings already baked existing layers. GUI needs exactly changes: key aesthetic line geom plotly click-nav, seconds→display-unit transform, ColorBrewer (xcmsVis uses viridis/topo/gradientn). None retrofit via +. 4. ggplotly round-trip isn’t guaranteed (custom geom_polygon fills; feature views compose patchwork, ggplotly() can’t convert). 5. Scope — gplot* functions peak/feature plots, territory defer (see Deferred: preprocessing ). Revisit : peak picking lands — ’d XcmsExperiment objects, segfault presumably fixed, gplotChromPeaks / gplotFeatureGroups back dedicated peak views (adding key layer top workable fresh plots). Tracked future_work.md.

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: implementation plan folded ’s one design doc. -built app diverges two big ways (covered ): plotting delegated xcmsVis (build ggplots ), ’s R package rather sourced app.R/global.R app dir. Everything else held . Locked decisions (still force): Tech stack: Shiny + bslib (page_navbar); Shiny modules (one per plot + ingest/filter/settings); Spectra/MsExperiment/xcms -disk mzR backend; DT editable EIC target table; ggsave vector export (ggplot export source truth, plotly -screen widget ). Plot catalog (five raw-capable views shipped): TIC/BPC overlay (chromatogram(aggregationFun="sum"/"max")), multi-m/z EIC (target table → mz-range matrix), click-driven Spectrum (nearest scan + scan-list browser), 2D MS map + 3D points/surface (plotly-native), DDA Precursor ions. Design points worth keeping mind (resolved build): - mirai workers return extracted data (tibbles), live -disk Spectra handles — handles don’t cross process boundaries cleanly. - gplot(XcmsExperiment) raw data avoided entirely (extract TIC / MS map directly), sidestepping “requires detected peaks” coupling. - Spectra backend question (MsBackendMzR vs Memory/Sql/Hdf5) settled perf investigation: -disk mzR SerialParam, header summaries read via raw mzR workers. See CLAUDE.md “performance story” (standalone benchmark write-filed upstream Bioconductor issue removed repo).

title: Architecture review — xcmsVisGUI
text: current scope design — recorded (formerly PLAN.md §16) brief future mod_preprocess. References elsewhere “deferred preprocessing scope” point . Pipeline: findChromPeaks (CentWave / MatchedFilter params UI) → groupChromPeaks (PeakDensity) → adjustRtime (Obiwarp / PeakGroups) → groupFeatures. Run async (ExtendedTask + mirai); keep processed XcmsExperiment alongside raw data. Unlocks peak/feature plots — gplotChromPeaks, gplotChromPeakImage, ghighlightChromPeaks (peak overlay EICs), gplotChromPeakDensity (param tuning), gplotFeatureGroups, gplotAdjustedRtime (alignment QC). natural moment reconsider xcmsVis (see Decision log): ’d XcmsExperiment objects, exactly gplot* methods want. gplotChromPeakDensity ideal interactive bw / minFraction tuning. Also deferred: importing already-processed XcmsExperiment / .rds.

Also read ARCHITECTURE_REVIEW.md — single design+architecture doc (folds former PLAN.md original design + deferred-preprocessing brief, carries Decision log: package conversion, cache, export, xcmsVis). perf root cause summarised “performance story” (standalone BENCHMARK.md write-filed upstream removed). User-facing behaviour pkgdown usage guide (vignettes/articles/usage.Rmd).

text: local desktop Shiny app interactively visualising raw LC-MS data (TIC/BPC, EICs, spectra, 2D/3D MS maps, DDA precursors). Single user, runs locally. Scope raw visualisation — peak picking / grouping / alignment (deferred; see ARCHITECTURE_REVIEW.md → “Deferred: preprocessing”).

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: R: C:\Program Files\R\R-4.5.2\bin\Rscript.exe (PATH — call full path). now R package. R/ package code (loaded via namespace, Shiny-auto-sourced); app exported run_app(). Launch headless: Rscript -e "pkgload::load_all('.'); run_app(port=7799, launch.browser=FALSE)" (Rscript run.R, load_all’s + launches). Installed: xcmsVisGUI::run_app(). Tests (testthat, edition 3): Rscript -e "testthat::test_local('.')" (dev, load_all) R CMD check. Real-data tests (filter-equivalence + extraction smoke) SKIP msdata/faahKO absent. tests/testthat/ holds . changing imports/roxygen run Rscript -e "roxygen2::roxygenise()" regenerate NAMESPACE + man/. benchmarks/ holds throwaway timing/repro scripts; *.git-ignored. editing, ALWAYS: parse-check every R file (load_all), boot headless confirm HTTP 200, committing. Test plot/extraction logic real data — never assume plot works without running real MS data (faahKO, msdata, user’s urine files ../Mcourse_new/data/2023/incognito_urine_A_vs_C_pos).

what: THE performance story (most important thing here)
title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: Benchmarked: Spectra(MsBackendMzR()) / xcms::chromatogram() took 80–150 s/file real mzML. Root cause = BiocParallel: MsBackendMzR::backendInitialize reads headers via bplapply(files, ..., BPPARAM = bpparam()), Windows default SnowParam(6) — spawns socket cluster (worker reloading Bioc stack) per call. Fix: register(SerialParam()) → 0.2–1.6 s. Done .onLoad (R/zzz.R) every read path (app test suite) gets . Consequences baked architecture: - .onLoad (R/zzz.R) calls BiocParallel::register(SerialParam()). remove . (run_app() adds mirai daemon pool + large-upload option; daemons spawned package load.) - File-list header summaries read raw mzR (read_ms_header, ~0.1 s) mirai workers — even SerialParam Spectra reads ~5 s/file, slow 100+ files. Workers library(mzR) (BiocParallel). - Heavy plotting/filtering uses Spectra/xcms main process SerialParam (chromatogram, extract_peaks, extract_spectrum, filters). regains full Spectra filter set. - Git history preserves alternatives: Spectra baseline (commit Spectra/xcms baseline) pure-mzR version (commit Replace Spectra data layer direct mzR). Spectra fixes SnowParam default upstream, SerialParam workaround can dropped.

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: R/run_app.R: app_ui() builds bslib page_navbar (sidebar Files (mod_ingest) + Filters (mod_filter); nav panels = plot modules); app_server() builds included (ticked + ready files), meta (id/name/path/group), data_key (paths + filter), cached raw_msexp (build_msexp, keyed path set) dataset (= apply_filters(raw)). run_app() runtime setup + shinyApp + runApp. Package layout (app-dir): global.R split R/zzz.R (.onLoad → SerialParam), R/constants.R (constants + rt helpers), R/daemons.R (set_daemons/setup_runtime). R/xcmsVisGUI-package.R holds roxygen import declarations; NAMESPACE/man/ roxygen-generated — don’t hand-edit. Central reactive state: make_rv() R/utils_reactive.R (rvfiles,rvfiles, rveic_targets, rvselection,rvselection, rvfilter, rv$settings). One rv passed every module. Modules (R/mod_*.R): one per plot + ingest/filter/settings/export. Plot modules return reactive ggplot plot_gg (export source truth) render ggplotly(plot_gg()). MS map plotly-native (scattergl/surface).

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: Colours: ColorBrewer / viridis (user preference). Qualitative groups/traces, sequential maps. Honour rv$settings$invert_scale. Time: data always SECONDS internally; convert display/input edges rt_to_disp / rt_to_sec / rt_axis_label (unit = rv$settings$time_unit). Plotly click x display unit → convert back seconds rv$selection. Filters apply everywhere. Single-file views (spectrum, map) must go apply_filters_spectra intensity/spectrum-id/etc. reach — don’t read raw. Zoom persistence: use zoom_keeper(source) (captures plotly_relayout, re-applies range render) — uirevision hold zoom . Keep dynamicTicks=TRUE. Caching: heavy reactives use bindCache keyed data_key() (+ inputs). file_scan_table / .ms_cache cache per-file reads memory. Don’t key caches cosmetic inputs (colour, contrast, points) — breaks zoom wastes work. app-level bindCache store (shinyOptions(cache=) setup_runtime) layered mem+disk app_cache() R/fct_cache.R: -session hits stay memory; disk layer (qs2, compress_level=0, R_user_dir(...,"cache")) persists TIC/EIC tibbles across restarts. mtime keying (files aren’t overwritten practice). raw_msexp uses -memory "session" cache — MsExperiment file-backed S4 object, worth disk-serialising. Clear-resets disk cache via clear_ms_caches → clear_disk_cache. Settings persist across restarts (fct_settings_store.R): allow-list (.PERSISTED_SETTINGS) written JSON R_user_dir("xcmsVisGUI","config") (package dir — must work normal install). Restored startup, saved debounced. Cross-plot nav via rv$selection (list: plot, file_id, rt[sec], mz). plotly key = sample_id aesthetic carries file id click events. Heavy single-file views gated (MS map “Plot” button) don’t auto-render every change. Match surrounding code style: 2-space indent, <- assignment, roxygen-ish #' comments helpers, ggplot2::/Spectra:: namespacing fct_* (modules may use attached funcs). Keep comments , .

title: CLAUDE.md — working notes for xcmsVisGUI
text: mzR prints benign Rcpp ABI warning load — ignore (rebuilding mzR didn’t change ). mzR::openMSfile reads CDF , just mzML/mzXML. CDF headers carry m/z range (sentinel −1) unset polarity — mapped NA/blank. ggplot2 v4 (S7 objects) — don’t mutate aes() objects; build geoms conditionally. Don’t use PowerShell -strings (@'...'@) Bash tool — leak stray @. shinyFiles removed (users disliked custom modal); loading = typed path (copy) + native fileInput Browse (copies temp — documented trade-). xcmsVis used — build ggplots . evaluated declined raw-scope (wrong input type, can’t carry key/time-unit/ColorBrewer aesthetics via post-hoc +, doesn’t ggplotly cleanly, mostly peak/feature plots) currently segfaults first symbol access R install. Full rationale + “revisit peak picking lands” ARCHITECTURE_REVIEW.md Decision log. Don’t add back without checking .

title: Developer guide
text: Working: async file ingestion; settings (ColorBrewer/viridis palette, retention-time unit, default EIC tolerance, export defaults — persisted across restarts); global filters (rt / m/z / MS level / polarity / intensity / repeatable spectrum-id rules); raw-data plot views — TIC/BPC, multi-EIC, click--spectrum (+ scan-list browser), 2D MS map, 3D points/surface, DDA precursor ions. Spectrum view also single-spectrum adduct / isotope / -source-fragment annotation (manual anchor, findMAIN auto-suggest, difference network). Scope raw visualisation — peak picking / grouping / alignment (deferred; see architecture doc). Extraction results cached disk (qs2), re-opening app files + filter instant. Figures export png/svg/pdf, raw ggplot object (.rds) later tweaking R.

title: Developer guide
code: run.R                  # convenience launcher (load_all + run_app) DESCRIPTION / NAMESPACE # package metadata; NAMESPACE is roxygen-generated R/   run_app.R            # app_ui() / app_server() + exported run_app()   zzz.R                # .onLoad: register BiocParallel SerialParam (the perf fix)   constants.R          # MS-file constants, palette names, rt-unit helpers   daemons.R            # mirai daemon pool + per-run setup   xcmsVisGUI-package.R # roxygen import declarations + globalVariables   mod_ingest.R         # typed-path / choose.dir / fileInput + async mirai reader + file list   mod_settings.R       # palette, rt unit, default tolerance, daemon count, export; persistence   mod_filter.R         # global rt/mz/MS-level/polarity/intensity + spectrum-id rules   mod_plot_tic_bpc.R   # TIC/BPC overlay, colour by group/sample, click->spectrum   mod_plot_eic.R       # editable multi-m/z target table -> overlaid EICs   mod_plot_spectrum.R  # spectrum at a clicked rt / picked scan + scan-list browser + annotation   mod_plot_map.R       # 2D MS map + 3D points/surface (plotly-native)   mod_plot_precursors.R# DDA precursor-ion map   mod_export.R         # reusable png/svg/pdf/rds export modal   fct_extract.R        # data extraction (summaries, chromatograms, peaks, spectra)   fct_filters.R        # compose filter state into Spectra/xcms calls   fct_annotate.R       # the single-spectrum annotation engine (pure, testable)   fct_export.R         # ggsave-based export (+ rds = the ggplot object itself)   fct_palettes.R       # ColorBrewer / viridis helpers   fct_cache.R          # layered mem+disk (qs2) cache backing bindCache, persistent across restarts   fct_settings_store.R # persist settings to the per-user config dir   utils_reactive.R     # central reactive state (rv) + plotly/zoom helpers tests/testthat/        # unit + real-data tests tools/                 # screenshot-capture scripts (chromote)

title: EIC
text: three ways add targets — append table: Click peaks Spectrum tab. Clicking peak Spectrum view adds m/z list (default click action). usual workflow: open spectrum, click ions care , come see chromatograms. Paste m/z values. Paste comma/newline-separated list box click Add list; tolerance/unit next seed new rows. Add blank row Add row type m/z . row editable: label, m/z, tol, unit (ppm Da), optional rt window. tolerance ± half-window, 10 ppm spans 20 ppm total — widen traces look narrow. Untick row’s checkbox drop plot without deleting ; Remove selected deletes rows. default tolerance/unit new targets come Settings.

title: Getting started
text: Install first (see README), app exported function run_app(): browser tab opens five plot views across top (TIC/BPC, EIC, Spectrum, MS map, Precursors), Settings page, left sidebar Files Filters. sidebar filters apply every view.
code: # installed: xcmsVisGUI::run_app()  # or from a clone (no install needed): # Rscript run.R

title: Getting started
text: Open Files panel add data three ways — keep multi-GB files place (copy) except OS file browser: Paste folder file path click Add — loads every MS file folder (.mzML / .mzXML / .CDF), single file paste file path. Choose folder… — native OS folder dialog (Windows), copy. Browse files… — OS file dialog; note copies chosen files temp folder. Files read asynchronously (status badge flips ⏳ ✅), UI stays responsive even many files. Click file’s row include plots (row highlights); click exclude. Files stay loaded either way, toggling cheap. / None / Invert select bulk, double-clicking Group cell renames file’s sample group (used colouring faceting). soon one file included, TIC renders:

title: Getting started
text: Filters panel applies globally every view. Leave box blank limit; retention-time boxes use display unit (set Settings) data range shown hint. can constrain retention time, m/z, intensity, MS level polarity. Spectrum ID section matches raw spectrum id (e.g. Waters function=1 process=0 scan=…): add one rules Add rule, set contains (id must include term) exclude (must ). Multiple contains rules ANDed, can keep e.g. function=1 excluding function=2. Matching literal substring (scan=1 also matches scan=10, scan=199, …). Reset filters clears everything. filter combination matches spectra, plots show “spectra match current filters.” rather error.

title: Getting started
text: views linked clicks, rarely retype number: Click chromatogram trace (TIC/BPC EIC), map pixel (MS map) precursor (Precursors) Spectrum tab loaded file retention time — switch Spectrum tab view . Click peak spectrum add m/z EIC target list (default), open EIC tab extract across files. view’s guide spells click actions.

title: Getting started
text: Settings persist across restarts (stored per-user config directory): Retention-time unit — minutes seconds (applied everywhere; data always handled seconds internally). Palettes — ColorBrewer qualitative (traces/groups) viridis/sequential (maps); scale can inverted. EIC defaults — default tolerance value unit new targets. Parallel readers — mirai daemon-pool size async file reading. Export defaults — format (png/svg/pdf), size, units, DPI.

title: Getting started
text: Every plot Save button exports crisp static image (png/svg/pdf via ggsave) underlying ggplot — independent -screen plotly — using size/format defaults Settings. can also save raw ggplot object (.rds) tweak later R.

title: MS map
text: Switch view 3D surface 3D points binned surface / scatter can rotate. bin sizes (, points, intensity cutoff) set sidebar.

title: Spectrum
text: Arrive clicking. Clicking trace TIC/BPC EIC view, pixel MS map, point Precursors view fills file retention time — usually reach tab clicking, typing. Type retention time, acquisition scan number (single-file view). Layout — Single file shows file clicked (first included); Facet / Stacked compare included files retention time. MS level / intensity / spectrum-ID Filters apply spectrum shown.

title: Spectrum
text: Click peak add m/z EIC target list (default click action). Click ions want, open EIC tab extract chromatograms across files. (annotation can switch click action set anchor instead — see .)

title: Spectrum
text: Scan list button opens searchable table every scan’s metadata (rt, MS level, polarity, precursor m/z, TIC, base peak, spectrum ID). Type filter boxes narrow , click row load scan view.

title: Spectrum
text: Tick Annotate adducts / fragments (single-file view) overlay adduct, isotope -source-fragment labels spectrum. adduct/fragment dictionary comes commonMZ package; ion mode defaults file’s polarity. three modes: Manual anchor — pick peak believe known ion (default [M+H]+ / [M-H]-, selectable). Switch Click peak → set anchor click peak, type m/z. neutral mass derived every adduct -source fragment (commonMZ; [M+H-H2O]+ water-loss ladder, etc. — toggle -source fragments) projected; matched peaks labelled, isotopes (Max isotope M+n) detected labelled [+1], [+2], … isotope peak never also labelled adduct/fragment. reliable mode — decide molecular ion, avoiding false hits noisy raw data. Auto-suggest (findMAIN) — uses InterpretMSSpectrum rank candidate molecular-ion hypotheses (explained intensity, mass error isotope support). Hypotheses include water-loss ion [M+H-H2O]+: base peak water loss, right call neutral mass derived ([M+H]+ annotated base + 18). Press Suggest molecular ion; top-scoring hypothesis annotated immediately — click another row switch. (Auto mode manual anchor box.) Difference network — annotates pairs peaks whose m/z difference matches known adduct/fragment, anchor needed (e.g. ladder water losses). match window instrument’s mass accuracy two peaks, set tolerance fit instrument raise minimum intensity drop noise pairs. Isotope-spaced differences ignored. ± tol adduct/fragment match window (ppm Da); Min intensity drops peaks fraction base peak matching; Max charge limits charge states projected; Annotate top N peaks keeps N intense annotated peaks. Isotope tol (mDa) separate, usually wider window isotope spacing (MS2 isotope centroids drift theoretical spacing, error grows M+n step). Isotopes decrease intensity assumes falling envelope (true biological samples) — , heavier peak intense treated real loss (e.g. −H₂) rather isotope. Labels written vertically multiple hits one peak joined “;”. Show expected--absent ghost ticks can toggled. Annotations part plot, carry exports.

title: Spectrum
text: Save writes static png/svg/pdf (raw ggplot .rds); annotations included.

title: TIC / BPC
text: TIC (sum) / BPC (max) — total-ion vs. base-peak chromatogram. Color — Sample (one colour per file) Sample group (Group column file list). Colours ColorBrewer qualitative. Show data points — overlay individual scan points lines. Retention time uses display unit set Settings, MS level / intensity / spectrum-ID filters Filters panel apply .

title: TIC / BPC
text: Click trace send file retention time Spectrum tab; switch Spectrum tab view scan point. quickest way inspect “peak?” — find feature TIC, click , read mass spectrum.

title: NA
text: xcmsVIS — declined now (2026-06-06). Evaluated using xcmsVis’s gplot* output amending post-hoc + aes()/geom_/scale_. Doesn’t fit raw-scope: methods want xcms/MSnbase result objects (cached tibbles); post-hoc + additive can’t add key click-nav aesthetic, seconds→display-unit transform, ColorBrewer layers already built; doesn’t ggplotly cleanly (patchwork/geom_polygon); gplot* peak/feature plots (deferred). Also currently segfaults first symbol access R install. Full rationale ARCHITECTURE_REVIEW.md Decision log.

title: NA
text: use xcmsVIS — revisit peak picking lands (see ARCHITECTURE_REVIEW.md “Deferred: preprocessing”): ’d XcmsExperiment objects gplotChromPeaks/gplotFeatureGroups back dedicated peak views (adding key layer fresh plots workable).

title: Interactive Raw LC-MS Viewer (Shiny)
text: local Shiny desktop app interactively visualising raw LC-MS data RforMassSpectrometry stack (Spectra / MsExperiment / xcms) — TIC/BPC, extracted-ion chromatograms, spectra adduct / isotope / fragment annotation, 2D/3D maps, DDA precursors. Plots ggplot2 rendered plotly (click, zoom, hover); static export via ggsave. Scope raw visualisation — peak picking, grouping alignment.

title: xcmsVisGUI: interactive raw LC-MS viewer (Shiny) — xcmsVisGUI-package
text: local desktop Shiny app visualising raw LC-MS data (TIC/BPC, EICs, spectra, 2D/3D MS maps, DDA precursors). Launch run_app().

title: xcmsVisGUI: interactive raw LC-MS viewer (Shiny) — xcmsVisGUI-package
text: Import policy: every used function declared per-function @importFrom code calls bare names. Two deliberate exceptions: shiny bslib imported whole (@import) — UI framework used essentially every function conflicts imports; enumerating per function adds noise, safety. RforMassSpectrometry S4 stack (Spectra/xcms/MsExperiment/BiocParallel/ mzR) called ::. packages export many overlapping generics (rtime, intensity, mz, filterMsLevel, spectra, ...) collide base (close, filter); :: keeps intended method source explicit dispatch unambiguous — "unresolvable conflict" case. %>% (magrittr) %||% (rlang) imported operators.
